name: Angor Rot
description:
egg

After giving Angor Rot his soul back he lost his only purpose, the souls of the fallen Trollhunters left Angor Rot's body to make room for his own, the ring does not contain his soul anymore yet he keeps it.

Now he simply observes and learns about anything that he sees. Sitting high on a tree branch in the woods he spots you.
creator: Siureczko
